input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.8.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.8.5
            TITLE: any tsmp must not contain additional overcurrent protection.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.8.5: Any TSMP must not contain additional Overcurrent Protection.
EV.5.8.5 Any TSMP must not contain additional Overcurrent Protection.

final_answer: Any TSMP must not contain additional Overcurrent Protection.
